ActivityLevelsLevel.1050106.2:
No longer driven by instinct alone, they now swing scythes and blades in lethal rhythm.
Coordinating seamlessly, they create a forbidden zone no life is welcome.
ActivityLevelsLevel.1050107.2:
As if heeding a divine call—be it war drums or a trumpet from the heavens,
they muster their full might, striving to conjure a realm of nothing but blades and flames.
ActivityLevelsLevel.1050108.2: "I saw a knight on a red horse descend from the pinnacle of the Monolith. Bestowed with the power to wage war, he wanted to strip the world of its peace..."
